name: 15m Signal + 5m Energy Overlay
edge_rationale: 5m energy confirmation may improve 15m signal entry timing by waiting for a high body/range candle with elevated volume.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: Late momentum chasers who enter after the move has already started.
frozen_assumptions: 15m signal detection uses trial-00095 exact parameters.
No lookahead: 5m search starts at 15m candle close.
expected_observation: If energy confirmation improves timing, MAE improves by at least 10 percent, ER is not degraded, and frequency remains at least 80 percent of baseline.
failure_modes: Entry price delta positive because waiting costs entry quality.
MAE worsens because energy candles select bad timing.
author: Cascade
